text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Aha — Jordan! We meet again, after countless eons! I'm gonna roll you up like a datemaki!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What are you talking about?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Do you have any last words?
With the flick of a finger, I will—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
…Phew, at least it's not that deep.
Here, I'll lend you my nail file.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Do you wanna put on a base and
top coat too? Look, like this?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh? …Whoooaaa! We've got a genius in
our midst and I didn't even know it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You know what, Jordan? You should enter a
contest! I, the mighty Golshi, shall handle all
the entry paperwork!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: A contest?! I'm not a pro or anything… But now you mention it, I am kinda pro level. I could try, I guess?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! Show them your burning
passion at the miniature town model contest!!
